features: Wonder Balm is made from natural fruit extracts aloe vera and papaya
Ideal for use on sore or chapped lips
Contains shea butter for extra moisture and to leave your skin feeling soft
Multi-functional balm which can be used on lips, hands, nails and cuticles
description: Wonder Balm Shea Butter has natural fruit extracts to moisutrise skin, lips, nails and cuticles. The balm is enriched with shea butter which nourishes and softens. The balm can also be used for cosmetic finishing.
